America's Chris Evert has won the women's singles title the most times in history at this tournament after claiming seven victories between 1974 and 1986. Both Belgium's Justine Henin and Poland's Iga Swiatek are two titles behind Evert after both winning this event four times since the turn of the century.

programme.title: Live UEFA Conference League
programme.desc: Crystal Palace v Rayo Vallecano (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the final from Red Bull Arena in Leipzig. Oliver Glasner's side are playing in their first ever European final after their first season in European football. The South London club beat Shakhtar Donetsk 5-2 across their two semi-final ties thanks to a 3-1 victory away from home, before winning 2-1 at home seven days later. Their Spanish opponents progressed thanks to a 2-0 aggregate victory that saw them win both ties 1-0.
